title: Y@ruwsha' #3388
definition:
Jerushah or Jerusha = "dispossessor"

 1) the wife of king Uzziah and mother of king Jotham of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jerushah or Jerusha = "dispossessor"

 1) the wife of king Uzziah and mother of king Jotham of Judah

    NASB:  taken possession of, mother of King Jotham
